IEntityCollectionRequest Properties

One Identity Manager API Server

The IEntityCollectionRequest type exposes the following members.

Properties
  NameDescription
CalculatedProperties
ColumnsToLoad
DataParameters
Returns the list of data parameters to use in the SQL statement.
DoNotSortOnApiServer
ExportSettings
ExtendedProperties
Returns custom properties containing data specific to this request.
FilterClauses
Returns the list of filter clauses for this request.
FkChildTableName
Gets or sets the table name of the child table of the foreign-key relation, if this is a request for foreign-key candidates.
GroupableColumnNames
HierarchyProvider
IsSearchAfterLoad Obsolete.
Gets or sets flag managing the search strategy.
LoadType
PageSize
ProcessingEntities
ResultColumns
ReturnExtendedData
SearchMode
Gets or sets flag managing the search strategy.
